title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 488.2253 - Fees, amount, payment
text:
488.2253.  Fees, amount, payment. — In every contested case, or case in which the evidence is to be preserved, except for the collection of delinquent or back taxes, before any circuit judge when an official court reporter is appointed, the clerk of said court shall tax up the sum of fifteen dollars, to be collected as other costs, and paid by said clerk to the director of revenue of the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 13346, A.L. 1951 p. 447, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 1993 S.B. 88, A.L. 2000 S.B. 1002 Revision) 
Prior revisions:  1929 § 11724; 1919 § 12673; 1909 § 11234 
Transferred 2000; formerly 485.120
